efs
v. 0.6.1
  1. org.efs.dispatcher
  2. EfsDispatchTarget

Uses of Class
org.efs.dispatcher.EfsDispatchTarget

Packages that use EfsDispatchTarget
Package
Description
org.efs.bus
EfsEventBus provides a loosely-coupled interface between efs agents.
org.efs.dispatcher
Dispatcher forwards events to agents in an effectively single-threaded manner.

  • Uses of EfsDispatchTarget in org.efs.bus

    Methods in org.efs.bus that return EfsDispatchTarget
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    EfsDispatchTarget<E>
    IEventRouter.routeTo(E event)
    Returns targeted IEfsAgent and Consumer<E> callback to which given event should be dispatched.

  • Uses of EfsDispatchTarget in org.efs.dispatcher

    Methods in org.efs.dispatcher with parameters of type EfsDispatchTarget
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <E extends IEfsEvent>
    void
    EfsDispatcher.dispatch(EfsDispatchTarget<E> target, E event)
    Forwards event to agent and callback contained in dispatch target.
